headline: Professional Tools and Equipment Stocks Q4 Highlights: Fortive (NYSE:FTV)
summary: Earnings results often indicate what direction a company will take in the months ahead. With Q4 behind us, let’s have a look at Fortive (NYSE:FTV) and its peers.
